nasb.text: There is the sea, great and broad, In which are swarms without number, Animals both small and great.

esv.text: Here is the sea, great and wide, which teems with creatures innumerable, living things both small and great.

cnv.text: 那裡有海，又大又廣； 海裡有無數的活物， 大小活物都有。

ccb.text: 汪洋浩瀚， 充满了无数的大小水族，

csbs.text: 其中有巨大的海洋，两面宽阔； 海里游动的活物无法数算，大小生物都有；
